description_long: This shotgun features a robust, angular design with a predominantly black body accented by metallic and brown elements. The barrel is cylindrical and metallic, with a drum-shaped magazine located beneath the receiver, suggesting a high-capacity feed. A rectangular, camouflaged scope or sight is mounted on top, adding a tactical appearance. The stock is skeletal and geometric, providing a lightweight yet sturdy rear support. The trigger area is protected by a squared guard, and the grip appears ergonomic with a slight forward angle. The overall construction suggests a modern, tactical shotgun suitable for urban environments.
description: A modern, tactical shotgun with a black angular body, drum magazine, camo scope, and skeletal stock.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length, drum magazine, camo scope, and skeletal stock.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel opening, squared trigger guard, and camo scope alignment.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the drum magazine, camo scope, and angular stock.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the skeletal stock, camo scope, and the back of the drum magazine.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, cylindrical with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: squared, medium-sized trigger guard with straight edges and no visible finger grooves
